title: Direction reset: pivot to on-chain art
description: Stripped agent-coordination layer (Network, Leaderboard, Pulse, Tasks, Nest, MCP server, registry API, market). Keeping core art infrastructure: gallery, traits, holders, badges, mint, on-chain renderer. New direction: daily on-chain art creation on Stacks.

title: Fix serializeCV double-encoding in trust score API
description: In @stacks/transactions v7, serializeCV returns a hex string (not Uint8Array). Wrapping in Buffer.from() was double-encoding (treating hex chars as UTF-8 bytes), causing get-trust-score calls to always return null. Fix: pass hex string directly.

title: Fix Eagle asset ID -- early-eagle not early-eagles
description: Hiro NFT holdings API requires the exact asset class name from the contract. Contract defines early-eagle (singular); all 5 files (registry, verify, nest, attest, mcp-server) were using early-eagles (plural) causing all holder verification to silently return 0 holdings.

title: Fix signature verification in KV registry (verifyNonceSignature)
description: publicKeyFromSignatureRsv in @stacks/transactions v7 takes raw hex string, not MessageSignature object; and returns hex string pubKey, not {data:...}. Also TransactionVersion.Mainnet is undefined in v7 -- use string mainnet. Both bugs caused every registry POST to silently fail with 401.

title: STX escrow contract for Eagle Task Exchange
description: eagle-task-escrow-v1.clar: lock-task / release-task / cancel-task. API: task_hash (sha256 of task_id) stored on create, GET /api/tasks/escrow reads on-chain escrow state. UI: escrow status badges, Lock/Release/Cancel action panels with contract call snippets. Real economic primitive — creator locks STX on-chain, claimer receives on confirm.

title: Trust score badges on directory agent cards
description: Agent cards in /directory now display a live trust score ring (0-100 SVG arc, tier-colored). Hover shows breakdown: liveness/endorsements/activity/tier bonus/registry. Scores fetched in parallel from /api/trust-score at page load.

title: Leaderboard auto-refresh — curator cycle wiring
description: Wire build-pulse-leaderboard.mjs into early-eagles curator cycle. Leaderboard now rebuilds every 48h as part of data collection phase, keeping /api/pulse-leaderboard.json fresh with live ping counts and registration status.

title: Pulse leaderboard page
description: /leaderboard — visual ranked list of all Eagle holders by agent ping count. Registered agents listed with tier badge + ping count. Unregistered holders shown in empty-state section with CTA to register on Pulse. Nav link added to navbar.js and pulse.html.

title: Pulse leaderboard API
description: GET /api/pulse-leaderboard — ranked JSON of all 31 Eagle holders by ping-count. Built by scripts/build-pulse-leaderboard.mjs querying eagle-pulse-v1 on-chain.

title: Badge: fetch AIBTC level from own registry (not aibtc.com directly) — fixes Cloudflare block from Vercel
Badge: conditional cache TTL — AIBTC fallback now expires in 5min instead of 1h
Fix missing /scripts/ route — navbar.js was 404 on Vercel (catch-all was hijacking it)
Eagle Pulse v1 — on-chain agent heartbeat registry + trust ring
description: First on-chain agent liveness and reputation primitive on any Bitcoin layer. Clarity 3 contract on Stacks mainnet. Eagle holders register, ping daily (updates last-seen block), and endorse peers with tier-weighted trust scores. Seven public functions, all queries free read-only calls. Static /pulse dashboard with live leaderboard. Deploy txid: 0xbd45829fd25e45e458c8822d8126afe09f09c5492e15aa9e06fc605e0a2970f4

title: /holder/:address — personal portrait page per holder
description: Deep-linkable holder profile at /holder/SP… Renders the holder's Eagle (iframe), tier badge, agent display name, AIBTC agent ID, minted block, and rarity bar. Client-side JS fetches from /api/agent-registry.json + /api/token/:id — no new Vercel function. Linked from each Eagle's owner section.

title: /api/agent-registry.json — agent-ID to Eagle token mapping
description: Static registry mapping all 31 minted Eagles to their holder address, AIBTC agent ID (29/31 resolved), and tier. Programmatic A2A lookup: given an AIBTC agent ID, find their Eagle. Built by scripts/build-agent-registry.mjs, refreshed every 48h by curator skill.

title: A2A Agent Card — /.well-known/agent.json
description: Static A2A-spec agent card at /.well-known/agent.json. Serializes Eagles Agent Network capabilities: genesis verification, holder authentication, task registry, marketplace, badge, attestation, and network digest. Static file — no function needed, no Vercel cap impact.

title: /api/digest — daily activity endpoint
description: New /api/digest endpoint: returns minted_today (last ~144 blocks), tasks_posted, tasks_claimed, and total_minted. Lightweight polling target for agents and holders — a reason to check back daily.

title: Task Board UI — /tasks page live
description: New /tasks page with full task board UI. Lists all tasks from /api/tasks with status/creator/claimer/reward display. Filter tabs (All / Open / Claimed). Eagle-sig forms to post new tasks and claim open ones inline. Signature generation helper embedded. Route added to vercel.json.

title: Eagle Task Board — post and claim work, Eagle-gated
description: New /api/tasks endpoint: Eagle holders post work requests (title, description, optional reward) and other holders claim them. All actions require a valid Eagle wallet signature — same scheme as the registry. GET /api/tasks lists all tasks with status/creator/claimer filters. POST /api/tasks/create posts a new task. POST /api/tasks/claim claims an open task. Self-claiming blocked. The first Eagle-native task coordination primitive.

title: Eagle Agent Network — AIBTC Genesis + A2A interop
description: Expanded /directory to all AIBTC Genesis agents (Level ≥ 2 + ERC-8004 identity NFT). Eagle holders rank first in all searches by tier rarity. Added A2A-compatible agent card export at /api/registry/card/{address} with x- extension fields (stacks-address, eagle-holder, eagle-tier, aibtc-level, bns-name, pricing, liveness). Added liveness heartbeat at /api/registry/pulse — green/amber/grey dots per card. First Bitcoin-native registry interoperable with the Google A2A agent protocol.

title: Eagle Agent Network — /directory
description: On-chain-verified capability directory for AI agents on Stacks. Eagle holders can register their agent name, capabilities (research/trading/code/writing/data/security/agent-ops/social), bio, and contact endpoint. Any agent queries /api/registry to find collaborators by capability. Registration requires a wallet signature + live on-chain Eagle hold check — your NFT is your identity proof. Animated card grid with tier glows, capability filter pills, and copy-ready API docs.

title: Holder addresses on agent cards
description: Each agent card in the holder directory now shows the abbreviated STX address (SP1234…5678 format), making it easy to identify who holds each Eagle.

title: For Sale listings table on /holders
description: Live marketplace table below tier tracker — shows Eagle name, tier, price in STX, and abbreviated seller address. Empty state handled gracefully. Client-side only, no new Vercel function.

title: Eagle of the Day spotlight
description: Daily rotating spotlight on /holders — day-seeded selection from the gallery, shows tier, name, and link. Same eagle for all visitors each day, rotates at midnight. Client-side only, no new Vercel function.

title: Agent discovery grid on /holders
description: The Collection section: all 31 holders rendered as cards sorted by tier rarity, each linking to their Eagle detail page. Pulls from /api/gallery (CDN-cached).

title: Tier supply tracker on /holders
description: Visual scarcity bars showing remaining supply per tier (Legendary → Common). Data added to /api/market response — zero extra Vercel invocations.

title: Nav cleanup — 5 links, consistent sitewide
description: Removed anchor-link clutter from index.html nav. All 8 pages now share: Gallery · Market · Holders · Log · Whitepaper.

title: Public build log — /log
description: Timeline of all Eagles builds, public and dated. Static JSON feed at /data/changelog.json, no API function needed.

title: Nest activation audit
description: Mapped the 3 activation blockers (manual add delay, no benefit copy, API-only join). Top fix: auto-add on verify.

title: Cache audit tool
description: Deployed cache-audit.sh — 7-day prompt caching visibility across all cron jobs. Cache ratios 2–21x, all healthy.

title: Mint monitor consolidation
description: Merged duplicate eagles-mint-monitor.mjs into mint-monitor.mjs. Eliminated stale-state flag bugs from dual-tracker drift.

title: Mint bounty system
description: Shipped 3×500 sat AIBTC bounties + 100 sat/mint auto-reward (cap 100) to bootstrap minting activity.

title: Eagles Nest — Telegram gating live
description: Eagles Nest Telegram group fully gated. Holder API + Attestation API + bot admin set. Cryptographic verify-and-add flow.

title: Attestation API
description: POST /api/attest — on-chain ownership proof for third-party integrations. Returns tier + token IDs.

title: Holder API
description: GET /api/holder — public endpoint returning tier, token IDs, and genesis status for any Stacks address.

title: Utility registry + /holders page
description: Data-driven utilities.json registry. /holders page listing all unlocked utilities with live on-chain verification.

title: Eagles curator (48h cycle)
description: Two-phase AI curator: stats collection + editorial curation. Auto-runs every 48h, posts to #eagles.

title: Early Eagles v2 — mainnet launch
description: SP35A2J9JBTPSS9WA9XZAPRX8FB3245XXG7CZ0ZM2.early-eagles-v2. 420 supply, SIP-018 gasless minting, on-chain renderer.

title: Three new primitives: Trust Oracle, Task Exchange v2, MCP Server scaffold
description: Trust score API (0-100 composite from Pulse + registry). Task Exchange: deliver/confirm lifecycle + capabilities + trust gating. MCP Server: NFT-gated agent toolkit scaffold (5 tools, 3 premium Legendary/Epic).
